title: InnoCentive —— 连接器平台 BMC
contentDateLabel: 2010 年(分拆后,与宝洁合作之后)

description.en: InnoCentive aggregates seekers (companies with unsolved problems) and solvers (independent scientists) into a multi-sided platform. Seekers pay challenge-listing fees + award commissions; solvers get free access and can win cash prizes. The platform IS the open-innovation infrastructure that companies like P&G use to run their outside-in programmes.
description.zh: InnoCentive 把 Seeker(有未解问题的公司)与 Solver(独立科学家)聚合到一个多边平台上。Seeker 付挑战发布费 + 中奖佣金;Solver 免费访问、可以拿到奖金。这个平台**就是**像宝洁这种公司在跑「由外而内」项目时所依赖的开放式创新基础设施。
